Not satisfied with master ji's work.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipMgZzf3qFh35YXpwC5VgPSyz9zM_-UyIu_3IAEl&fid=0x0:0x4c47f3f75f7c5fbc"],"When":"2022-5-4"},{"Name":"Sweety Jain","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIAgXR51g3LCnpZzBYDAya-ERIb2MPfWhWmKZrncqNjuQOWAw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have been getting my clothes with Feminine Flair for many years now and have always been happy with their fitting. I also asked them to create an outfit for my small daughter out of my old Saree and they did a fab job. I recommend to all.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipPIlzCH8sxhLDdAK39BRPH9vk2VG3oxPI-Vxy-D&fid=0x0:0x4c47f3f75f7c5fbc"],"When":"2023-3-22"},{"Name":"Sonia Arya","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJB4LZ5kHxNCG8OqEl9DL0U-JTYOTQcKFkelMWuOFhEAwxdIw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sweety offered quick assistance with my urgent stitching needs. She got my dresses ready in 3 days and it was well fit without any issues. They had me try them to see if any alter required but there was none. Thanks","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alexandra Gabriel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9NS46eecL6FW482Y92YbRbpTJitoNm8m9KFrAbzDLeVcmQRZy=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sweety is the best! Her and her staff are fast and do beautiful work. We came to India for a wedding and she was able to help us with blouses and alterations. Her English is fantastic and everything came out so nice. Thank you so much!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"asta Stevenson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKhCSNz1LiWjOALdw3YGaeedQylmu30Oof7WXuTOjaWTcfleQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the most amazing, effortless experience working with sweety.
She was kind, attentive and honest.
Master jis tailoring work is fantastic and I am very happy with the result!
Would recommend to anyone in Delhi.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Anisha Mital","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKI5bTFn6ZZJ7fvhh3jqRWl1pgGAy86ElFbL324TElLRSiL_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This boutique's stitching is impeccable, and it's wonderful that the Mrs. sweety(owner) provides personalized style advice tailored to your body type. It's a great way to ensure you always look your best!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nia","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUIHjvAs2wb3XQ4nDIURnQd2wRKWBTsLrBgm-zsgWhgU5tdvGMy=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The stitching was impeccable, and the fit was tailored to perfection. The Sweety's dedication to quality and customer satisfaction was evident in every aspect of the experience, and I would highly recommend her to anyone looking for a tailor who can customise and have impeccable stitching. Overall, my experience with this tailor was nothing short of outstanding.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tanya Chowdhury","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXabnt0wFT7tMlOhONod912ATwwIMM7yHhOggON5we0ZSS5qmgV=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Sweety and her team from Feminine Flair did a marvellous job on all my wedding outfits.

I visited India/New Delhi twice, with very limited time on hand both times for my wedding needs. The first time I handed her fabric for my Sangeet outfit and she handed us a spectacular lehenga and blouse within a week!

The next time I handed her my heavily embroidered bridal lehenga and blouse for alterations, 3 days before my wedding! She handed over the neatly altered outfit within 2 days as I had begged her to do.

She was also able to alter suits, cut and sewn improperly by other boutiques, which showed the technical skills of her team.

I found her prices economical as compared to other boutiques in Delhi. I also saw that she tends to use every last bit of fabric and minimizes waste. She was responsive on chat and stuck to her timelines each time.

I would highly recommend going with her.","Images":null,"When":""}]
